title: Different column options in the same board
excerpt: It would be helpful to have the ability to have custom column options in the same workspace. I find that I need to group items separately within the same workspace (for example: blogs, emails, videos) and each would be b…

posts.author: costrander (Chris Ostrander)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful to have the ability to have custom column options in the same workspace. I find that I need to group items separately within the same workspace (for example: blogs, emails, videos) and each would be better managed with their own custom columns as opposed to having to follow the same structure for the entire board.
